title: manisuris fasciculata
intro: Manisuris fasciculata, also known as the clustered manisuris, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Apiaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Manisuris fasciculata include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In terms of herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
